rule_text: Complexity-increasing Ordivon changes require declared debt, anti-overforce review, and tests or receipts.
consequence_check: Reduces hidden complexity risk while preserving scoped work.
rule_boundary_check: Applies only to complexity-increasing Ordivon changes.
false_positive_cost: May slow legitimate exploratory architecture work.
human_cost: Low if exception review is available.
exception_path: Exception review can narrow scope when exploration is intentionally time-boxed.
authority_boundary: This ethics review does not authorize action and is candidate only.
